description_long: This object is a sleek, black throwing knife with a symmetrical, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade features three diamond-shaped cutouts along its center, reducing weight and adding a distinctive visual element. The handle is integrated into the same piece of metal as the blade, forming a full tang construction, and ends in a circular ring, likely for grip security or attachment. The entire surface appears to be matte black, possibly coated for corrosion resistance and reduced reflectivity. The knife is compact and streamlined, designed for easy handling and precise throwing. There are no visible decorative engravings or additional materials beyond the main metal body.
description: A compact, matte black throwing knife with a double-edged blade, diamond-shaped cutouts, and a ringed handle. The design is sleek and utilitarian, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the double-edged blade, diamond cutouts, and the circular ring handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and handle, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, showing the blade profile, cutouts, and ring handle.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the tip, emphasizing the pointed blade and slim profile.
attribute_handle_design: integrated straight handle with circular ring, matte black metal, no grip texture
